context7.description: Up-to-date library documentation for Expo, SignalR, EF Core, React Navigation, NativeWind, Zustand, React Query

github.description: GitHub integration for PRs, issues, CI/CD, code review

sequential-thinking.description: Complex problem decomposition for architecture decisions and multi-step planning

playwright.description: Browser automation for admin web E2E testing and visual regression

figma.description: Figma design-to-code: extract design context, colors, spacing, components from Figma frames. Use for pixel-perfect React Native UI generation.
